meta.title: PADEL2GO – AI Padel, P2G League & Marketplace | Europe
meta.description: PADEL2GO combines mobile courts, AI camera analysis, a Europe-wide padel league and a marketplace on a single platform. Get started today.

hero.title: Your padel. Your level. Your game.
hero.descriptionLine1: Mobile courts · AI analysis · EU league · P2G marketplace.

vereinSteps.subtitle: In 6 steps from the first conversation to the first match

steps.title: On-site visit
steps.desc: Site check with surface analysis and aerial drone footage – we assess which areas are suitable for padel courts.

steps.title: Building permit & approval
steps.desc: We handle the planning and support the building permit process – including all technical documentation and authority communication.

steps.title: Court setup & installation
steps.desc: Professional installation of mobile padel courts on your surface – turnkey and ready to play.

steps.title: Digital setup
steps.desc: App integration, booking system, AI cameras and lighting – the court is fully digitised.

steps.title: Opening & first matches
steps.desc: Grand opening with event, marketing support and the first booked matches from your members.

steps.title: Ongoing operations
steps.desc: Maintenance, season management and technical support – we take care of it, you collect revenue share.

ecosystem.description: Our AI cameras capture your game, calculate your score and place you in the Europe-wide P2G League. The better you play, the more P2G Points you earn – redeemable in the Marketplace.

cards.title: AI camera at the court
cards.label: AI analysis
cards.description: Every session can optionally be recorded. The camera automatically detects highlights, creates a heatmap of your movements and calculates your personal Match Score – based on points, accuracy and playing style.

cards.title: P2G League – EU-wide
cards.label: League & ranking
cards.description: Your Match Score directly affects your rank in the P2G League. Compare yourself with players from across Europe, climb the leagues and establish yourself as a P2G Legend.

cards.title: P2G Points & Marketplace
cards.label: Marketplace
cards.description: The higher your Match Score, the more P2G Points you earn. Redeem them in the Marketplace – for bookings, equipment, services and exclusive member deals.

audience.subtitle: Your gateway to the P2G world

cards.title: For players
cards.desc: Book in seconds, have your game analysed by AI, collect P2G Points and climb the EU League. Every match counts.

cards.title: For clubs
cards.desc: We deliver mobile padel courts, booking system, AI technology and community concept. No capex, with revenue share.

cards.title: For brands & partners
cards.desc: Reach a highly engaged, sporty audience directly at the court, in the app and at our touchpoints across Europe.

locationTeasers.subtitle: Here's where we're opening next — stay tuned!
